data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices-based architecture to manage various components such as video processing, user interface, and data storage.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: To handle the massive influx of requests, YouTube employs load balancing techniques to distribute traffic effectively.

data.title: Scalable Databases
data.description: YouTube uses scalable databases to efficiently manage video metadata, user data, and analytics.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A global CDN ensures quick video delivery by caching content closer to the user’s location.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: To process and analyze large datasets, YouTube employs robust data pipelines.
